title: Cumb
bodyText:
Goblin. **Origin:** the Bag of Holding belonged to **[[thread-mr-spells|Mr. Spells]]** — goblins ambushed his little caravan/team, and the party found them obsessively stuffing loot into the bag. They killed the goblins, interrogated one, and had such a good time with them that Cumb got spawned into existence. He negotiated survival by organizing the bag's contents while wearing a french maid outfit. Feed twice a day. Found the two S-marked bodies in the bag.

**Languages:** speaks Common but can't READ it; speaks and reads Goblin.

A sneaky little boy. Really likes **[[pc-felson|Felson]]** and **[[pc-varen|Varen]]**. His only tie to [[pc-trunks|Trunks]]: both had connections to Mr. Spells. Portrait: art/cumb.png (character sheet PDF in the import archive).
